# Blocks index — derived reverse index (GENERATED)

<!-- RFC Phase 2 (F5/F14): GENERATED by scripts/generate_blocks_index.py. Do not edit; `used_by` is derived, never stored. -->

- **verified_at:** 2026-07-09
- **toolchain_version:** coreai-core==1.0.0b2, coreai-torch==0.4.1, torch==2.9.0, transformers==4.57.6

## How to read this (F1/F12)

A block is an ARCHITECTURE id only — no license of its own (license stays per-recipe). **Loadability is never inferred from a block id**: a block 'known' at one envelope `(graph, static shape, precision, host-contract)` carries NO promise at another (the same MoE stack loads at L=12 fp16, fails at L=18). Status reports **`measured @ {envelope}`** — NEVER `SOLVED`. SenseNova's SigLIP @ 980px/patch-14 in a MoT is NET-NEW, not covered by a lingbot ViT-B/16 @ 512px.
